name: group_invite

metadata.description: Group membership notification email (sent by GroupMember.send_invite). This is an access notification for an existing user — there is no login token or invite link. The user already has an account.
notes: `user` is a dict (user.to_dict('basic')) auto-injected by User.send_template_email if missing.
`group` is a dict (group.to_dict('basic')) provided by the caller in GroupMember.send_invite.
No token or token_url is provided — this is not an account-setup invite. Log in normally to access the group.

subject_template: You've been added to{% if group.name %} {{ group.name }}{% endif %}
text_template:
Hello{% if user.display_name %} {{ user.display_name }}{% endif %},

You've been added to{% if group.name %} "{{ group.name }}"{% endif %}. You can log in to your account to access it.

If you weren't expecting this, you can ignore this email.
html_template:
You've been added to a group

Hello{% if user.display_name %} {{ user.display_name }}{% endif %},

You now have access to{% if group.name %} {{ group.name }}{% endif %}. Log in to your account to get started.

Group
{% if group.name %}{{ group.name }}{% else %}(unnamed group){% endif %}

If you weren't expecting this, you can ignore this email.

Sent by Django-MOJO
